summary: Added a snapshot-native reconciliation adapter that reads canonical queue, append-only projections, and referenced evidence from one immutable commit and emits separate source and candidate digests without authorizing mutation.
observed: The adapter resolves one full commit and reads source blobs from that tree.
Source-inventory and reconciliation-candidate digests are independent.
inferred: This closes the mixed-time working-tree read gap identified by the prior continuity handoff.
proposed: Define a signed or policy-bound materialization-authority contract.
superseded: Working-tree reconciliation can represent an immutable historical snapshot.
unresolved: No runtime test execution was observed in this run.
privacy_boundary: Public repository artifacts only; no raw private chat, health data, credentials, identifying personal information, or unreviewed uploads.
next_action: Execute the committed tests in CI, then specify and test a deny-by-default authority contract that remains separate from snapshot consistency and reconciliation validity.
